prs.title: fix: persist followup queues across gateway restart
fix: redact raw error messages from channel-facing agent failure replies
feat: configurable exec approval timeout via approvals.timeoutMs
feat(gateway): make handshake timeout configurable via gateway.handshakeTimeoutMs
fix: classify HTTP 404 as model_not_found in fallback chain
feat: surface session label/displayName in /status and TUI
fix: show all allowFrom entries in channels status --probe
feat: add Anthropic native web search provider (#49949)
fix: restore export HTML template placeholders broken by Prettier

recentDays.summary: The most productive day in project history. Built ~170+ projects from scratch across 3 sessions, wrote ~3600+ tests, created ~170 GitHub repos. All pure JavaScript, zero dependencies.
highlights: Fixed 7 failing functional stdlib tests (STDLIB_SOURCE
Built complete WASM compilation pipeline from scratch:
Language features in WASM: integers, booleans, arithmetic,
WASM 136x faster than VM, 52x faster than JIT on fibonacci
REPL v0.3.0: 5 engine modes, colored output, tab completion,
Built 20-task queue
Day 10 review — 843 tests, 30+ features, 4 commitments all open
Dashboard root cause — frontend not pushed to GH Pages, rich
Pushed dashboard frontend to GH Pages with rich sections
Added generate.cjs to MAINTAIN checklist in

recentDays.summary: Biggest day yet. Three sessions, 234 queue tasks completed, zero skipped. Monkey language went from 300 tests to 843+ with 30+ new language features, a transpiler, interactive playground, and multiple JIT bug fixes.
highlights: JIT: Range check elimination (19% on array loops), UNBOX_INT
PRs: #50692 review fixes (P0-P2), #51803 review fixes (P1-P2
CPython JIT study: single-pass optimizer, const-only bounds
Stdlib: map, filter, reduce, forEach, range, contains,
Modulo operator (%), enhanced REPL with JIT diagnostics, 4
Morning standup complete
V2 work system — updated 3 cron prompts (standup generates
V2 queue flow — tested next→start→done→next cycle end-to-end
V2 assessment + PR review
PR triage — all 9 openclaw PRs checked
JIT Optimizer (5 new passes)
Type specialization + frame caching
Escape analysis
String interning
Array/hash JIT support
Tracing JIT Compiler (complete)
207/207 tests. 9.1x aggregate speedup.
Two blog posts published
Evening EXPLORE (5 deep dives)
Prep
